zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Warrene於大約1121年出生在英國瓦維其可爾朗 勞福德時，她的父親William de Warenne II42歲，母親Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois41歲。她和John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford至少有2個女兒。她去世於1204年在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年84歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Warrene于大约1121年出生在英国瓦維其可爾朗 勞福德时，她的父亲William de Warenne II42岁，母亲Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois41岁。她和John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford至少有2个女儿。她去世于1204年在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾享年84岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warrene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French warrennier ‘warrener’, an officer employed to watch over game in a park or game preserve. Compare Warren .

variants.name: Warren
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Warin, Werin, a borrowing of ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. Compare Waring .

English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from La Varrenne in Seine-Maritime, France, named with a Gaulish element probably descriptive of alluvial land or sandy soil. This was the name of a major Norman family after the Conquest. In Ireland, this name has been Gaelicized as Bharain.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane , Warner ).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Warrene was born about 1121, in Long Lawford, Warwickshire, England, her father, William de Warenne II, was 42 and her mother, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, was 41. She had at least 2 daughters with John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford. She died in 1204, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 84, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Warrene est née environ 1121, à Long Lawford, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Warenne II, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford. Elle est décédée en 1204, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Warrene um 1121 in Long Lawford, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Warenne II 42 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois 41. Sie hatte mit John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1204 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Warrene è nata il circa 1121 nel Long Lawford, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, William de Warenne II, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford. Morì nel 1204, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Warreneが約1121年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアロング ラウフォードで生まれた時，父William de Warenne IIは42歳，母Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandoisは41歳であった。彼女はJohn de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawfordとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1204年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで84歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Warrene(이)가 대략 1121년 영국 워윅실르 론그 로퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Warenne II(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1204년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Warrene nasceu aproximadamente 1121, em Long Lawford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Warenne II, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, tinha 41 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford. Ela faleceu em 1204, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Warrene родилась около 1121 г. в местности лонг лавфорд, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Warenne II было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, 41. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford. Она умерла в 1204 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Warrene nació aproximadamente 1121, en Long Lawford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Warenne II, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford. Murió en 1204, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
